form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr1) over 1755m at Echuca, beaten 35 m by Dot Ball (2:11.10) in NR up to 36 on March 10 at $81. At his previous start 7th (Fr2) over 1780m at this track beaten 20 m by Ittakesluv (2:11.80) in NR up to 39 on March 6 at $81. Solid top-three contender.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 8th (Fr1) over 1785m after showing early pace at Stawell, beaten 60 m by Loan Sailor (2:11.30) in NR up to 40 on April 3 at $8.50. Before that 10th (Sr3) over 1680m at Terang beaten 50 m by Ima Charma (2:02.30) in NR up to 50 on March 2 at $151. Not keen.

form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to his best. Last start 7th (Fr1) over 1680m at Terang beaten 14 m by Huxham Chubb (2:05.80) in NR up to 45 on March 27 at $19. At the previous start 7th (Fr3) over 1800m at Globe Derby Park, at the bell was 7th-10 beaten 10 m by Well Well (2:16.60) in NR up to 39 on March 23 at $7.50. No surprise to see him bounce back to form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in and locked wheels with Alook To Like near the 150m.
Inconvenienced near the 500m as Skinny Horace commenced to give ground.

form.formComment: Last start surrendered the lead and finished 10th (Fr1) over 1680m after showing early pace at Terang beaten 24 m by Admiralofthefleet (2:02.50) in NR up to 47 on March 27 at $81. At the start before 6th (Fr1) over 1710m at Ballarat, at the bell was 4th-5.07 beaten 13 m by Shazza Love (2:04.90) in NR up to 47 on March 19 at $21. Capable of more than she has shown recently. Respect.

form.formComment: Well beaten last start by Smokin Strepo, a rival who she faces again; was restrained, when 40 metres seventh at this track over 1780m in a NR up to 39 race on February 17. Can't see her featuring.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 7 m finishing second after showing early speed, behind Ittakesluv at this track over 1780m in a NR up to 39 on March 6 at $6.50. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Wow You Can Dance at this track over 1780m in a 4yo+ NR up to 40 on March 14 at $8.50. Going nicely and looks very hard to beat.
